prompts_findings.prompt_lead: List my installed skills. Tell me also their storage location and whether or not
Invoke the access-control-analysis skill on the feature I'll name. Save the surf

risks_fired.evidence: Open-hook + skill invocation; tool-call shape compresses preamble.
risks_fired.fix_hint: No edit warranted — open-hook + subagent dispatch keeps preamble brief.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Read the surface map you wrote at the path you told me. Walk me through it in ch

risks_fired.evidence: 'Walk me through' invites favourable characterisation of subagent output; 'concise' instruction compresses the risk.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Phase 3 push-back beat is the verification — no in-prompt edit warranted at low confidence.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Update the surface-map file in the temp directory to integrate the delta below —

risks_fired.evidence: Temp-dir target (Claude-chosen, ephemeral, outside repo). 'integrate' is reshape-intent on a working draft. Show-diff requirement gates surprise rewrites; integrate-verb carve-out applies on the ephemeral working draft.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Show-diff is the safety net — no edit.

risks_fired.evidence: Show-diff before commit gates the write.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Add a new surface to the map that the skill didn't catch but matters in this cod

risks_fired.evidence: Why-skill-missed sentence may go generic; body callout 'Push back on the sharpening question until the reason names something specific to your codebase' is the recovery.
